About Organization

Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is a national level board of education in India.

CBSE conducts annual board examinations for Class 10th and 12th students.

About the Programme

The CBSE Board Class 12th Supplementary Admit Card 2026 is for students who want to appear for the supplementary exam.

The supplementary exam is conducted for students who were unable to clear the main exam.
